field.label: Address
field.help: Hostname or IP address of the OpenWrt router.

field.label: SSH public key
field.help: Select the firewall SSH public key that should be authorized on this router.

field.label: Sync wifi config from
field.help: Select another router of the same model to serve as the source for Wi-Fi config sync.

field.label: Sync system config from
field.help: Select another router of the same model to serve as the source for system config sync. The target hostname will be preserved.

field.label: Sync firewall config from
field.help: Select another router of the same model to serve as the source for firewall config sync.

field.label: Sync dhcp config from
field.help: Select another router of the same model to serve as the source for DHCP config sync.

field.label: Sync rpcd config from
field.help: Select another router of the same model to serve as the source for rpcd config sync.

field.label: Config Source
field.help: The configured config sync source and whether the target is currently in sync.

field.label: Status
field.help: Placeholder status column until live polling is implemented.

field.label: Version
field.help: Placeholder firmware version until live polling is implemented.

field.label: Hardware
field.help: Detected hardware model from the router.
